_comment: Reference only. Register servers via: claude mcp add ... -s user
_register_commands: claude mcp add git -s user -- uvx mcp-server-git
claude mcp add jira -s user -e JIRA_URL=$JIRA_URL -e JIRA_USERNAME=$JIRA_USER -e JIRA_API_TOKEN=$JIRA_TOKEN -- uvx mcp-atlassian
claude mcp add confluence -s user -e CONFLUENCE_URL=$CONFLUENCE_URL -e CONFLUENCE_USERNAME=$CONFLUENCE_USER -e CONFLUENCE_PERSONAL_TOKEN=$CONFLUENCE_TOKEN -- uvx mcp-atlassian
claude mcp add playwright -s user -- npx @playwright/mcp@latest

git.purpose: Git operations: branch, commit, push, log

jira.purpose: Create projects, epics, tasks, sprints in JIRA

confluence.purpose: Create and update Confluence pages in CR space
